everyone thinks the whispering on the first album was this intense artistic choice  really  finneas was just asleep in the next room and i didn t want him to wake up and eat my cereal

finneas had the mic set up right next to my bed  and i was so exhausted i literally refused to stand up  we did the entire vocal take for  bury a friend  with me lying flat on my back on the mattress  staring at the ceiling fan  if you listen really closely to the stems  i m pretty sure you can hear the fan clicking in the background

i don t want anyone to feel ripped off

i spent three weeks trying to make a synthesizer sound exactly like dust settling on velvet  we eventually just recorded the velvet

i used to get so annoyed when journalists would call something we did experimental like no we just hadn t figured out the right way to do it yet experimental implies you planned the confusion and we absolutely did not

i ve only been addicted to two things   funk and praise

i was backstage at the show in the middle of hair and makeup when this news was delivered  and they gave me no choice
